_about: Reviewed name and work/series content for all character and unit gallery title records. This is content-only source data: it contains no encoded payload, glyph slot, font choice, relocation target, or ROM-writer decision.

_review.name_policy: Every name_zh is copied by char_id/utid from ref-project v1.1 data/names; local name variants are not substituted.
_review.series_policy: Canonical full work titles are retained; local width-limited display aliases are deliberately omitted.
